# unifi_clients (Data Source)

All clients currently connected to the UniFi site. Wired and wireless clients expose a MAC address and uplink device; VPN and Teleport clients do not.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List every client currently connected to the site.
data "unifi_clients" "all" {}

# The wireless clients, with the IP and MAC the controller reported for each.
output "wireless_clients" {
  value = [
    for c in data.unifi_clients.all.clients : {
      name = c.name
      ip   = c.ip_address
      mac  = c.mac_address
    } if c.type == "WIRELESS"
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `clients` (Attributes List) The connected clients. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--clients))

<a id="nestedatt--clients"></a>
### Nested Schema for `clients`

Read-Only:

- `connected_at` (String) RFC 3339 timestamp the client connected at. Empty if not reported.
- `id` (String) Client UUID.
- `ip_address` (String) Current IP address. Empty if the controller has not reported one.
- `mac_address` (String) MAC address. Only populated for WIRED and WIRELESS clients; empty otherwise.
- `name` (String) Client name (hostname or display name).
- `type` (String) Connection type: WIRED, WIRELESS, VPN, or TELEPORT.
- `uplink_device_id` (String) UUID of the device this client connects through. Only populated for WIRED and WIRELESS clients; empty otherwise.
